visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit retail store. A woman with long black hair and red lipstick, wearing a black top and a blue shoulder bag, demonstrates paying with a credit card. She inserts a pink card into a black terminal. Shelves of merchandise are visible in the background. (2) The setting changes to an indoor dining area. The woman, now in a red and white striped shirt and a braided hairstyle, talks animatedly to the camera. The lighting is soft and natural. She uses various hand gestures to emphasize her points about shopping differences. (3) The scene transitions to a home environment. The woman is shown in a yellow fuzzy coat, looking tired while using a tablet at night. This is followed by a shot of a cardboard delivery box placed outside a white apartment door in bright daylight. (4) A screen recording of the Shopee mobile application is displayed. It shows a series of short-form videos with product links. A specific product, DHC Vitamin B capsules, is highlighted. Graphics and text overlays explain how users can earn commissions by posting videos. (5) The final phase returns to the woman in the striped shirt in a bright room. She points towards the screen and encourages the audience to use her referral code. Yellow and orange text overlays appear, providing instructions on how to join the affiliate program.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 買東西的時候. [Slogan]: 韓國 VS 台灣. (2) [Subtitle]: 刷卡一定要插進機器. [Variety]: (客人自己要做). (3) [Subtitle]: 韓國人都不要收據. (4) [Slogan]: 晚上11點網購 隔天早上就到. (5) [Slogan]: 過了兩天還沒到？. (6) [Slogan]: 超多海外直購商品 可以等2週！！！. (7) [Subtitle]: 等兩個禮拜？還行耶. (8) [Slogan]: 提早收到. (9) [Subtitle]: 韓國沒有團購嗎？. (10) [Slogan]: 也能拿15%以上的分潤. [Logo]: @shopeetw. (11) [Slogan]: 觀眾就能直接點擊左下角. (12) [Slogan]: 快使用我的推薦碼 6W5YV5E.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator portraying two characters through costume changes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, often wearing either a black casual top or a red and white striped polo shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Transitions between a store aisle, a restaurant interior, a home bedroom/living room, and mobile app interfaces.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a high-pitched, friendly female voice saying a greeting in Korean, accompanied by a bright 'ding' transaction sound effect. The background music is a bouncy, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady 120 BPM tempo and a major tonality. (2) As the scene shifts, the female narrator switches to Mandarin Chinese. Her tone is casual and energetic, with high pitch variability. The BGM continues smoothly, providing a consistent rhythmic bed. A doorbell 'ding-dong' SFX is heard clearly during the delivery segment of the narrative. (3) During the app demonstration, the audio features several rapid, high-frequency UI sound effects like 'pops' and 'clicks' that sync with the visual transitions on the smartphone screen. The BGM remains present but lowers slightly in volume to allow the spoken explanation to be dominant. (4) In the final segment, the speaker's vocal arousal increases as she delivers a call to action. Her speech is clear and well-articulated. The electronic music track reaches its conclusion with a final rhythmic beat and a brief fade-out as the referral code is displayed.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video compares the shopping culture and logistics efficiency between South Korea and Taiwan to build interest, eventually leading to a promotion for Shopee's affiliate program ('Shopee Video').

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides a referral code and explains a specific commission-earning feature of the Shopee app.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality production combining storytelling with promotional content for social commerce.
